use_cases: Micro-interaction button that expands from circular icon to text label on hover for space-efficient UI.
Loading state button that collapses to spinner when async operations are in progress.
Versatile action button supporting multiple visual variants for contextual actions in dashboards or toolbars.
Interactive element for mobile-friendly expandable navigation items or menu triggers.
ai_summary: A micro-interaction button component that animates from a circular icon to an expanded pill shape containing text on hover. Features smooth width transitions, staggered text fade-in, loading state handling with spinner, and multiple style variants (default, outline, ghost, destructive). Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations, this reusable component is ideal for space-efficient UI patterns in dashboards, toolbars, or navigation systems where contextual actions need to remain compact until needed.
